news_items.title: Jordan vs Argentina World Cup 2026 Predictions and Best Bets | Juvefc.com
news_items.author: Sergio Lattanzi
news_items.text:
Jordan vs Argentina World Cup 2026 Predictions and Best Bets | Juvefc.com

World Cup 2026

# Jordan vs Argentina Prediction: World Cup 2026 Preview & Best Bets

Jordan vs Argentina | World Cup 2026 Group J | Matchday 17 Date: Saturday, 27 June 2026 Kick-off: 21:00 local (UTC-5) | 03:00 BST (28 June) Venue: AT&T Stadium, Dallas (Arlington), USA Stage: Group J – Matchday 17 TV/Streaming (UK): BBC / iPlayer

Betfred

5.0

Welcome Bonus

Bet and Get New Bettor Bonus of £50 in Free Bets

BET NOW

## What’s At Stake

Argentina arrive in Dallas having already secured top spot in Group J with six points from two games and a +5 goal difference, meaning this fixture is a dead rubber for L. Scaloni’s side in terms of qualification. Jordan, on zero points and eliminated from Round of 16 contention, cannot progress but remain desperate to register their first World Cup point or goal of the group stage. Pride, history and the chance to avoid finishing with nothing from their maiden World Cup campaign are the only prizes left for J. Sellami’s debutants.

### Verdict

Argentina are overwhelming favourites at 1/5 and, with the group already won, Scaloni will likely rotate but still field enough qua

news_items.title: Jordan Announces 26-Man Squad for FIFA World Cup 2026
news_items.author: ANI
news_items.text:
Jordan Announces 26-Man Squad for FIFA World Cup 2026

Fri, 26 Jun 2026 · LIVE

Updated Jun 4, 2026 · 10:36

Sports World News Updated Jun 4, 2026

# Jordan Names 26-Man Squad for Historic FIFA World Cup 2026 Debut

Jordan has announced its 26-man squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, led by star forward Mousa Al Tamari. The team will be without injured striker Yazan Al Naimat but welcomes back captain Ehsan Haddad. Jordan will play a friendly against Colombia before competing in Group J against Austria, Algeria, and Argentina. This marks Jordan's historic debut at the World Cup after finishing runners-up at the AFC Asian Cup.

ANI

Jun 4, 2026 · 2 min read · 398 views

Save Listen Copy

## Jordan announces 26-member squad for FIFA World Cup 2026

New York, June 4

The Jordan Football Association has announced its 26-man squad for the FIFA World Cup 2026, led by star forward Mousa Al Tamari.

The Nashama will be without influential striker Yazan Al Naimat, who is sidelined due to a knee injury sustained at last year's FIFA Arab Cup. However, Captain Ehsan Haddad returns after nearly a year out with injury.

Talisman Al Tamari scored seven goals and provided 11 assists in 36 league and

{"title": "Jordan Announces 26-Man Squad for FIFA World Cup 2026", "url": "https://www.newkerala.com/news/a/jordan-announces-26-member-squad-fifa-world-cup-2026-678.htm", "publishedDate": "2026-06-04T10:36:26.000Z", "author": "ANI", "text": "Jordan Announces 26-Man Squad for FIFA World Cup 2026

Fri, 26 Jun 2026 · LIVE

Updated Jun 4, 2026 · 10:36

Sports World News Updated Jun 4, 2026

# Jordan Names 26-Man Squad for Historic FIFA World Cup 2026 Debut

Jordan has announced its 26-man squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, led by star forward Mousa Al Tamari. The team will be without injured striker Yazan Al Naimat but welcomes back captain Ehsan Haddad. Jordan will play a friendly against Colombia before competing in Group J against Austria, Algeria, and Argentina. This marks Jordan's historic debut at the World Cup after finishing runners-up at the AFC Asian Cup.

ANI

Jun 4, 2026 · 2 min read · 398 views

Save Listen Copy

## Jordan announces 26-member squad for FIFA World Cup 2026

New York, June 4

The Jordan Football Association has announced its 26-man squad for the FIFA World Cup 2026, led by star forward Mousa Al Tamari.

The Nashama will be without influential striker Yazan Al Naimat, who is sidelined due to a knee injury sustained at last year's FIFA Arab Cup. However, Captain Ehsan Haddad returns after nearly a year out with injury.

Talisman Al Tamari scored seven goals and provided 11 assists in 36 league and"}
